Anthropic._comment: Never commit a real key here. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY as an environment variable, use dotnet user-secrets, or your cloud provider's secret manager.

Koru._comment: Base URL of the koru-main backend. The DashboardAgents API calls this to fetch the template catalog and design images.

Jwt._comment: Must match the JWT signing key used by koru-main so both APIs share the same token. Set JWT_KEY as an environment variable in production — never commit the real key.
